notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: In-app alerts for transactions, goals, and investments
notifications.budgetAlertsHint: When off, the server will not create new transaction, goal, or investment notifications

passwordChange.title: Change password
passwordChange.description: Enter your current password, then your new password.
passwordChange.errorGeneric: Could not update password. Please try again.
passwordChange.errorWeak: Password must be at least 6 characters.
passwordChange.errorRecentLogin: For security, sign out and sign in again, then try once more.
passwordChange.errorTooMany: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
passwordChange.errorNoPasswordProvider: This account does not use email/password sign-in.
passwordChange.oauthHint: You signed in with Google or another provider. There is no app password to change for this account.
